tools.name: organizations.kmsinventoryOrganizationsProtectedResourcesSearch
tools.description: Returns metadata about the resources protected by the given Cloud KMS CryptoKey in the given Cloud organization.

tools.name: projects.kmsinventoryProjectsCryptoKeysList
tools.description: Returns cryptographic keys managed by Cloud KMS in a given Cloud project. Note that this data is sourced from snapshots, meaning it may not completely reflect the actual state of key metadata at call time.

tools.name: projects.kmsinventoryProjectsLocationsKeyRingsCryptoKeysGetProtectedResourcesSummary
tools.description: Returns aggregate information about the resources protected by the given Cloud KMS CryptoKey. Only resources within the same Cloud organization as the key will be returned. The project that holds the key must be part of an organization in order for this call to succeed.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
